title: Cyberspace Shaders
body:
Cyberspace Shaders

Shaders that aims to recreate Cyberpunk 2077 Cyberspace LiDAR effect
You can use this shaders to create stunning visuals in-game that you can use in content creation or play with. Current features: - Point cloud created using DDA-Raymarching - Customizable lidar settings for fade distance, density, size, and DDA steps - Customizable point motion settings - Customizable points and world colors - Vignette More features coming in future.


This project is licensed under CC0 (Public Domain)
